title: Cynoglossum phardycalyx
intro:
I couldn't find any information on Cynoglossum phardycalyx. However, I can tell you about Cynoglossum amabile, also known as Chinese forget-me-not. 

Cynoglossum amabile is a perennial plant in the borage family, native to China, with blue flowers resembling forget-me-nots.

The health benefits of Cynoglossum amabile are said to include its potential to treat fever, cough, and sore throat. It is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of Cynoglossum amabile include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Cynoglossum amabile include decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
